Marketing support

We help you go to market, not just to product.

Co-branded assets, sector-specific campaign packs, MDF, and bespoke support. Everything is available to registered partners, request what you need below.

Asset library
Logos, product imagery, one-pagers, and presentation templates, all ready to co-brand.
Co-branded templates
Email, social, digital ads, and print templates with your logo alongside Purple.
Campaign-in-a-box
Sector-specific campaign packs for hospitality, retail, education, healthcare, and more.
Bespoke support
Need something specific? Request custom creative, landing pages, or event collateral.

Request marketing support

Tell us what you need and your partner manager will get back to you within two working days.

Marketing support request
For registered partners only. Not yet a partner? Apply here.

Request received

Your partner manager will be in touch within two working days.

Ready to add Purple to your portfolio?

Join 80,000+ venues already running on Purple. No targets, no minimums, just bigger deals.

Partners
Purple Partners, the channel program for resellers, MSPs, and systems integrators selling identity-based WiFi solutions.
